title: Current awareness alerts: UKHSA Knowledge and Library Services
body: "Types of current awareness alerts available Current awareness alerts are comprehensive research alerts that bring together and highlight the latest research from peer-reviewed publications about important health topics.  Adverse Weather and Health Research Bulletin  The Adverse Weather and Health Research Bulletin is an evidence-based resource produced by UKHSA’s Centre for Climate and Health Security (CCHS) on behalf of the Extreme Events and Health Protection Team. The bulletin includes the latest published research articles on adverse weather events and their impacts on health to help you make informed decisions.  Frequency: monthly   Global Health Security Global Health Security (GHS) has been identified as a priority for UKHSA. To support this, the Global Health Security team have developed this resource to highlight a selection of recent, peer-reviewed publications in the field of global health security.  Frequency: monthly   Mental Health The Mental Health Current Awareness Update highlights the latest research on the risk factors for mental health, preventive interventions, service provision, prevalence and inequalities.  Frequency: monthly   Healthy Ageing The Healthy Ageing Current Awareness Update is published on the first day of the month, and highlights the latest research from age-related guidance and journals.  Frequency: monthly   Infection The Infection Current Awareness Update highlights the latest research from infection-related guidance and journals, and new publications from the National Infection Service.  Frequency: every Monday morning   Long COVID KLS have been producing a weekly Long COVID Research Alert since December 2021.  Frequency: every Wednesday morning   Musculoskeletal Health The Musculoskeletal Health (MSKH) Current Awareness Update highlights the latest research from MSKH-related guidance and journals.  Frequency: first day of each month   Nutrition, Diet & Obesity Journal Contents Update The Nutrition, Diet & Obesity Journal Contents Update highlights the latest research from particular journals covering the topics of nutrition, diet, and obesity.  Frequency: every Monday morning   Vector Borne Diseases Current Awareness Update This update contains content, news, information and journal articles on vector borne diseases caused by ticks and mosquitoes.  Frequency: every Monday morning   Antimicrobial Resistance Current Awareness Update The Antimicrobial Resistance Current Awareness Update is a bulletin highlighting the latest research on antimicrobial resistance.  Frequency: monthly    Current awareness alerts privacy policy Current awareness alerts are delivered by Vable. By signing up to these alerts, your data will be handled in line with their Privacy Policy. You may unsubscribe at any time by submitting a general enquiry using our form, or by using the unsubscribe link on the email alert.   Request current awareness alerts  Complete the form to sign up to any of these current awareness alerts.  Request alert  Set up your own alerts  Database alerts  You can create your own alerts in most databases available via MyAthens.  To create an alert:    Create a personal account in the database.   Complete a search strategy.   Save the search and follow the steps to create an alert.    Help with specific databases    OVID (video tutorial)  EBSCO (video tutorial) ProQuest Scopus Web of Science   BrowZine BrowZine is another way for you to stay up to date, using your browser or a mobile app. More guidance on...
